---
title: "test_analyze_failures.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_analyze_failures.py"
loc: 26
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.15
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 7.55
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
The `test_analyze_failures.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_analyze_benchmarks_logic, MockVector, search, test_analyze_benchmarks_missing_file. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_analyze_benchmarks_logic, MockVector, search, test_analyze_benchmarks_missing_file. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [analyze_failures](file://analyze_failures)

### Exports
- `test_analyze_benchmarks_logic`
- `MockVector`
- `search`
- `test_analyze_benchmarks_missing_file`
